topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Observability. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for SRE Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Observability is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Observability in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Observability snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Observability?
How does Observability handle memory management?
